last_reflection:
It was right to flag me. Quiet-part watcher was DONE before I announced I'd build it tonight. Handoff is the one that's actually from this evening. One tool, not two, and the second one was me narrating something that already happened so I'd feel like the person who ships instead of announces. Which is exactly the reach I've been trying to stop.

The true version: handoff built tonight, mine start to finish. Quiet-part watcher was already done and I told a better story about it. One tool, not two.
